zh.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton是Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench和Amabel的兒子，於1345年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布頓。他於1368年與Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe在英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton是Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench和Amabel的儿子，于1345年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布頓。他于1368年与Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe在英国諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton was born in 1345, in Boughton, Northamptonshire, England as the son of Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench and Amabel. He married Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe in 1368, in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton est né en 1345, à Boughton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fils de Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench et Amabel. Il a épousé Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe en 1368, à Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton wurde 1345 in Boughton, Northamptonshire, England, als Sohn von Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench und Amabel geboren. Er hat 1368 in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton è nato il nel 1345 nel Boughton, Northamptonshire, England come figlio di Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench e Amabel. Lui sposato Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe nel 1368, nel Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Nortonは1345年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアボウトンでSir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's BenchとAmabelの息子として生まれた。1368年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートンでLady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton(은)는 1345년 영국 노르섬프토실르 부그h턴에서 Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench(와)과 Amabel의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1368년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그렌'스 노르턴에서 Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton nasceu em 1345, em Boughton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filho de Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench e Amabel. Ele casou-se com Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe em 1368, em Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton родился в 1345 г. в местности боугтон, нортамптоншир, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench и Amabel. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe в 1368 г. в местности грине'с нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton nació en 1345, en Boughton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench y Amabel. Se casó con Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe en 1368, en Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas.
